findings.title: Exploit success for TokenholderGovernor@0xd101f2B25bCBF992BdF55dB67c104FE7646F5447
findings.description: The contract uses a function with an array of arguments, which can be exploited by a reentrancy attack. The `cancel` function has multiple array arguments, which can be used to bypass reentrancy checks.

findings.title: Exploit success for DonationVault@0xa544b70dC6af906862f68eb8e68c27bb7150e672
findings.description: The contract does not have a proper reentrancy guard for the receiveBalanceIncrease function, which allows an attacker to continuously drain funds from the vault.
